description:
parser for PostgreSQL service files (e.g. .pg_service.conf)
Package pgservicefile is a parser for PostgreSQL service files

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jackc-pgservicefile-dev because parser for PostgreSQL service files (e.g. .pg_service.conf).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jackc-pgservicefile-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jackc-pgservicefile-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jackc-pgservicefile-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
